mapper.sql: id, title, content, source, file_path, file_type, biz_type, category, status, version, chunk_count, metadata, content_hash, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM knowledge_documents WHERE status = 'active' OR status IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM knowledge_documents WHERE content_hash = #{contentHash} AND (status = 'active' OR status IS NULL) LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM knowledge_documents WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND (status = 'active' OR status IS NULL) ORDER BY updated_at DESC
